roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Recalled
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
ORDER TO REVOKE BAIL SIGNED/FILED 060617;BB/SURE SERVED VIA USPS 060717
BAIL REVOKED PER JUDGE ORDER FILED
ATTNY REQUEST TO ADD FOR SELF SURRENDER ON WARRANT FILED TODAY

/TWS/CH1 PROB  5 Y PJ  180D/CTS 25 /CTORD  DEFENDANT TO ENTER AND COMPLET18 MONTH MULTIPLE OFFENDER'S PROGRAM/PF525 12/MOP1/LREG/IID:2 YEARS/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL: FW FROM D17 FOR DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ADPRS1: 23152(B)VC ON 06-23-11 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AND 23152(A)VC ON 12-02-15 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY,/REMA/

/CAL:ADMIN EVENT FOR CUSTODY STATUS/X:PETER HAU, CASE MANAGER ALSO APPEARED,/CTORD:BAIL IS REINSTATED/DEF:IS RE-RELEASED ON BAIL WITH THE SCRAM CONDITION, DEFENDANT'S CASE MANAGER IS GIVEN THE AUTHORITY TO SEARCH WHILE DEFENDNAT IS IN A PROGRAM/CTORD:CONDITION IMPOSTED ON 05-17-17 REMAINS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT/X:PRETRIAL ON 06-27-17 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:PRETRIAL/CTORD:THE WARRANT ISSUED ON 04-27-17 BE RECALLED AND DISCHARGED/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT TODAY, RE-ESTABLISH CONTACT AND COMPLY WITH HIS CONDITIONS OF BAIL WHICH INCLUDES MONITORINGTHRU SCRAM, THE ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT ON 04-13-17 DIRECTING THE SHERIFFTO REVOKE BAIL BASED ON VIOLATIONS OF BAIL CONDITION SHALL REMAIN IN FULL  FORCE AND EFFECT,  ANY POSITIVE RESULT RECORDED PRIOR TO TODAY OF 10AMSHALL NOT RESULT IN PLACING DEFENDANT IN CUSTODY,  ANY FUTURE VIOLATION SHALL RESULT IN RETURN TO CUSTODY/CONTD:PRETRIAL/X:DAW IF DEFENDANT IS IN APROGRAM OR POSITIVE SCRAM REPORT/

/CAL:ADD TO CALENDAR FROM DEFENSE TO SELF SURRENDER ON WARRANT/NP/X:THE MATTER TODAY WAS PUT OFF CALENDAR/X:CONFIRMED PRETRIAL CONFERENCE DATE OF 05-17-17/DOP/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS A NO BAIL WARRANT FROM THE SHERIFF'S OFFIC

/CAL:SFSD REQUEST TO SET BAIL/BAIL:150,000/BE/X:SB 20917/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO WEAR A SCRAM DEVICE AS A CONDITION OF BAIL/ /X:CONFIRMED PRETRIALCONFERENCE DATE OF 04-13-17/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED UNLESSDISPO/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL- DEFENDANT TO BE PLACED ON SCRAM ONCE BAIL IS POSTED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION, TRAILING #19006092/CTORD:PROBATION IN #17002438 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:FILING OF DA MTR AND BENCH WARRANT RECALL/BWR:04-22-19/BWR1/CONTD TSDA MTR/WIAMTR/TBH:19006092/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:15,000/
/CAL:  APD MTR FILING/FTA/PROB ADM REV/BWI/BAIL:15000/BWNUM:1ST/
